groups.description: Implement core compiler contracts: PlanningEnvelope normalization, compiler result statuses, archetype/tie-breaker selection, scope boundary output, one-question ambiguity handling, and target-depth completion obligations.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_compiler.py -k 'envelope or status or archetype or tie_breaker or depth'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_lifecycle.py -k 'needs_input or compile_failed or package'

groups.description: Implement source/goal synopsis, thin-source behavior, structured phase/task LLM contracts, deterministic no-date filtering, task quality gates, validation severities, and bounded repair that preserves user anchors and scope.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_compiler.py -k 'synopsis or thin_source or llm_contract or validation or repair or forbidden_date'

groups.description: Implement estimate normalization, outlier replacement, oversized split requirements, low-calibration thresholds, compiler trace/redaction, real-context fixtures, no-scheduler-output fixture assertions, and final OpenSpec task completion.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_compiler.py -k 'estimate or low_calibration or trace or redaction or fixture or scheduled_dates'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_compiler.py
